parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "plan_tier": "free",
  "launchpad_access": false,
  "nova_os_access": false,
  "ai_tools_limit": 0,
  "automation_systems": 0,
  "priority_support": false,
  "white_label": false,
  "updated_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.updatedAt }}"
}

={
  "user_email": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.email }}",
  "stripe_customer_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.customerId }}",
  "event_type": "subscription_cancelled_forced",
  "plan_tier": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.planTier }}",
  "cancellation_reason": "payment_failed",
  "amount_owed": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.amountOwed }},
  "currency": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.currency }}",
  "occurred_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.cancelledAt }}"
}
